Class SpellChecker

java.lang.Object
application.SpellChecker
public class SpellChecker extends Object
Enhanced SpellChecker with double HashMap for better spell checking and auto-correction. Uses a dictionary + common misspellings approach with edit distance calculations.

    Class
    Description
    static class
